calendar.matters:
PETITION Petition For Transfer Of Community Property And For Authorization Of Proposed Transactions
Off Calendar Jan-24-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michelle Duvall for and with Eiko Sakai.

The Court stated that everything appears to be in order and granted the petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.
